title: Should I use a Roth or traditional retirement account?
question_body: Community question about should i use a roth or traditional retirement account?
answer_body: Many people split contributions to hedge against future tax-rate uncertainty.

title: Should I use a Roth or traditional retirement account?
question_body: Community question about should i use a roth or traditional retirement account?
answer_body: Compare your marginal tax rate now with the rate you expect in retirement; Roth favours paying tax while rates are low.
combined_text: Should I use a Roth or traditional retirement account? Community question about should i use a roth or traditional retirement account? Compare your marginal tax rate now with the rate you expect in retirement; Roth favours paying tax while rates are low. retirement tax roth ira

title: Do I need a financial advisor?
question_body: Community question about do i need a financial advisor?
answer_body: A fee-only fiduciary helps with complex tax, estate or retirement planning; simple investing may only need a low-cost index fund.
combined_text: Do I need a financial advisor? Community question about do i need a financial advisor? A fee-only fiduciary helps with complex tax, estate or retirement planning; simple investing may only need a low-cost index fund. advisor investing retirement fees

title: When should I prioritise retirement contributions?
question_body: Community question about when should i prioritise retirement contributions?
answer_body: After high-interest debt and a starter emergency fund, capture the full employer match before anything else.

title: Where should I keep my emergency savings?
question_body: Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings?
answer_body: Split it: one month in checking for instant access, the rest in a high-yield account.
combined_text: Where should I keep my emergency savings? Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings? Split it: one month in checking for instant access, the rest in a high-yield account. saving emergency-fund risk

title: Should I refinance my mortgage?
question_body: Community question about should i refinance my mortgage?
answer_body: Watch the term reset: lowering the rate but restarting 30 years can raise total interest paid.
combined_text: Should I refinance my mortgage? Community question about should i refinance my mortgage? Watch the term reset: lowering the rate but restarting 30 years can raise total interest paid. mortgage refinance interest-rate

title: How are capital gains taxed?
question_body: Community question about how are capital gains taxed?
answer_body: It depends on holding period, income, jurisdiction and cost basis. Separate short-term from long-term and keep records.

title: Should I invest in ETFs or individual stocks?
question_body: Community question about should i invest in etfs or individual stocks?
answer_body: For most investors, diversified low-cost ETFs cut idiosyncratic risk and need less monitoring than single stocks.

title: How much credit utilisation is healthy?
question_body: Community question about how much credit utilisation is healthy?
answer_body: Keeping reported utilisation under about 30%, and ideally under 10%, helps your score.
combined_text: How much credit utilisation is healthy? Community question about how much credit utilisation is healthy? Keeping reported utilisation under about 30%, and ideally under 10%, helps your score. credit-score credit-card

title: How can I improve my credit score?
question_body: Community question about how can i improve my credit score?
answer_body: Pay on time, keep utilisation low, avoid unnecessary applications and check your reports for errors.
